title: Ministry's AI project faces heat
desc: The Democrat Party has called on the Ministry of Digital Economy and Society (DES) to review its proposed TH-AI Passport project, citing concerns over transparency, procurement practices and value for money.
title_cn: 数字部「AI护照」项目面临质疑
summary_cn: 民主党敦促数字经济和社会部（DES）重新评估其「泰国AI护照」项目。该党对项目的透明度、政府采购实践和经济效益提出严重关切，要求确保采购流程的合规性和公众利益。这一倡议的问责制和实际价值评估已成为当前政治焦点。
desc_original: The Democrat Party has called on the Ministry of Digital Economy and Society (DES) to review its proposed TH-AI Passport project, citing concerns over transparency, procurement practices and value for money.

title: Blue regime debate ignites
desc: The political landscape has proceeded to a new phase of debate following accusations by opposition leaders that the country is now operating under what they describe as the "blue regime".
title_cn: 「蓝色政权」争议激化
summary_cn: 泰国政治形势进入新阶段，反对派领袖指责该国目前处于所谓「蓝色政权」体制下运作。这一指控随即在政坛掀起激烈辩论，「蓝色政权」的定义、性质及其影响成为焦点。该争议反映了泰国不同政治派系的深层对立。
desc_original: The political landscape has proceeded to a new phase of debate following accusations by opposition leaders that the country is now operating under what they describe as the "blue regime".

title: Chiang Mai a top spot for digital nomads: Forbes
desc: Chiang Mai has once again gained international recognition after Forbes magazine named it one of the world's eight leading destinations for digital nomads and creators in 2026.
title_cn: 清迈入选全球顶级数字游民目的地
summary_cn: 清迈再次获得国际认可，被 Forbes 杂志评选为2026年全球八大顶级数字游民及创意工作者目的地之一。这一荣誉进一步巩固了清迈作为国际创意工作者中心的地位，有望吸引更多全球远程工作者前往该地工作生活。
desc_original: Chiang Mai has once again gained international recognition after Forbes magazine named it one of the world's eight leading destinations for digital nomads and creators in 2026.

title: Co-pay scheme misses 30m target
desc: Registration for the government's "Thais Help Thais Plus 60/40" co-payment scheme closed nearly four million places short of its 30 million target, despite attracting more than 26.04 million applicants in five days.
title_cn: 「泰国人帮泰国人60/40」计划注册未达目标
summary_cn: 泰国政府「泰国人帮泰国人60/40」共付计划注册期已截止。尽管在五天内吸引超过2604万人申请，但最终注册人数仍未达到既定的3000万目标，差约400万名额。该计划旨在扩大社会援助覆盖范围。
desc_original: Registration for the government's "Thais Help Thais Plus 60/40" co-payment scheme closed nearly four million places short of its 30 million target, despite attracting more than 26.04 million applicants in five days.

title: Pattaya Tourist Police assist distressed Chinese visitor found at convenience store
desc: Pattaya Tourist Police responded after a Chinese visitor and child were found in distress at a local 7-Eleven, coordinating assistance to ensure their safety and well-being. PATTAYA, Thailand – Tourist police in Pattaya provided assistance to a Chinese visitor accompanied by a child after the pair was spotted at a local convenience store on May 29, with the visitor reportedly experiencing emotional distress. Concerned members of the public alerted authorities after noticing the individual showing signs of unease at a 7-Eleven store. Tourist police officers responded to the scene and immediatel
title_cn: 芭提雅旅游警察救助受困中国游客
summary_cn: 芭提雅旅游警察于5月29日在当地7-Eleven便利店协助一名中国游客及其陪同儿童。该游客因情感困难陷入困境，经民众发现并报警后，旅游警察及时赶到现场，为其及儿童提供了必要的帮助和支持。
desc_original: Pattaya Tourist Police responded after a Chinese visitor and child were found in distress at a local 7-Eleven, coordinating assistance to ensure their safety and well-being. PATTAYA, Thailand – Tourist police in Pattaya provided assistance to a Chinese visitor accompanied by a child after the pair was spotted at a local convenience store on May 29, with the visitor reportedly experiencing emotional distress. title: U-Tapao Rayong–Pattaya Airport and Queen Sirikit Hospital conduct full-scale MERS emergency drill
desc: Medical teams and emergency responders take part in a full-scale MERS drill at U-Tapao Rayong–Pattaya International Airport, testing screening, patient transfer, and infection-control procedures. SATTAHIP, Thailand – Queen Sirikit Naval Hospital and U-Tapao Rayong–Pattaya International Airport joined forces on May 26-27 to conduct a full-scale emergency response exercise designed to prepare for potential outbreaks of emerging infectious diseases, including Middle East Respiratory Syndrome (MERS). The annual emergency preparedness exercise aimed to strengthen public health response capabilities
title_cn: U-Tapao Rayong–芭提雅国际机场与皇后西丽吉医院联合进行MERS应急演习
summary_cn: 医疗团队和应急响应人员在U-Tapao Rayong–芭提雅国际机场参加全规模MERS应急演习，测试筛查、患者转运和感染控制程序。该年度应急准备演习旨在加强公共卫生部门对包括中东呼吸综合征（MERS）在内新兴传染病的应急响应能力，为可能的疫情爆发做好准备。
desc_original: Medical teams and emergency responders take part in a full-scale MERS drill at U-Tapao Rayong–Pattaya International Airport, testing screening, patient transfer, and infection-control procedures. SATTAHIP, Thailand – Queen Sirikit Naval Hospital and U-Tapao Rayong–Pattaya International Airport joined forces on May 26-27 to conduct a full-scale emergency response exercise designed to prepare for potential outbreaks of emerging infectious diseases, including Middle East Respiratory Syndrome (MERS)

title: Khao Kheow Open Zoo marks 48th anniversary with free entry for children and seniors
desc: Khao Kheow Open Zoo is celebrating its 48th anniversary with three days of special activities, wildlife encounters, live entertainment, and conservation exhibits from June 1-3. PATTAYA, Thailand – Just about an hour’s drive from Pattaya, Khao Kheow Open Zoo is inviting visitors to join its 48th anniversary celebrations with three days of special activities, including free admission for children and senior citizens on June 3. Zoo Director Narongwit Chotchoi said the popular wildlife attraction officially celebrates its 48th anniversary on June 1 and will host a special event, “48 Years of
title_cn: 考艾开放动物园 Khao Kheow Open Zoo 庆祝48周年，儿童和老年人免费入园
summary_cn: 位于芭提雅约一小时车程处的考艾开放动物园庆祝其48周年，于6月1-3日举办三天特别活动，包含野生动物互动、现场娱乐和保护展览。园长表示6月3日儿童和老年公民可免费入园，邀请游客参加这一备受欢迎的野生动物景点的周年庆祝活动。
desc_original: Khao Kheow Open Zoo is celebrating its 48th anniversary with three days of special activities, wildlife encounters, live entertainment, and conservation exhibits from June 1-3. PATTAYA, Thailand – Just about an hour’s drive from Pattaya, Khao Kheow Open Zoo is inviting visitors to join its 48th anniversary celebrations with three days of special activities, including free admission for children and senior citizens on June 3. Zoo Director Narongwit Chotchoi said the popular wildlife attract

title: Pattaya workers watch the skies as weekend rains threaten incomes
desc: Two workers walk along Pattaya Beach Road after their shifts as forecasts of heavy weekend rain raise concerns about slower business and shrinking earnings across the city’s tourism-dependent economy. (Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya workers, particularly those whose livelihoods depend on outdoor activity and nighttime tourism, are being advised to prepare for periods of heavy rainfall forecast across the region this weekend. Meteorologists have warned that seasonal monsoon conditions could bring widespread showers and isolated heavy downpours to parts of eastern Th
title_cn: 芭提雅工人为周末降雨威胁旅游收入而担忧
summary_cn: 气象学家警告季节性季风条件可能为泰国东部地区带来广泛阵雨和局部暴雨。芭提雅工人，尤其是生计依赖户外活动和夜间旅游业的工人，被建议为可能出现的大雨做准备。周末暴雨预报令人担忧，因其可能导致游客减少、生意清淡，从而威胁该市旅游依赖型经济中的收入。

title: Thai authorities dismantle brutal Chinese cross-border loan shark gang in Pattaya
desc: Thai police arrested four Chinese fugitives in Banglamung, Chonburi, after uncovering their alleged links to a violent cross-border loan shark syndicate wanted in China. PATTAYA , Thailand – Thai immigration police and Crime Suppression Division officers have arrested four Chinese nationals wanted by authorities in China for their alleged roles in a violent transnational loan-sharking operation in Pattaya area on May 30. The joint operation followed directives from the Royal Thai Police to crack down on foreign criminal networks operating in Thailand. Investigators identified the suspects as k
title_cn: 泰国当局破获在芭提雅活动的中国跨境暴力高利贷团伙
summary_cn: 泰国移民警察和犯罪压制部门于5月30日在春武里府邦拉蒙地区逮捕四名中国籍逃犯，他们与一个在中国被通缉的暴力跨国高利贷团伙有关。这次联合行动是根据皇家泰国警察消除在泰国活动的外国犯罪网络的指示进行的。此案涉及跨境犯罪和暴力活动，对在泰外国人的人身和财产安全构成直接威胁。
desc_original: Thai police arrested four Chinese fugitives in Banglamung, Chonburi, after uncovering their alleged links to a violent cross-border loan shark syndicate wanted in China. PATTAYA , Thailand – Thai immigration police and Crime Suppression Division officers have arrested four Chinese nationals wanted by authorities in China for their alleged roles in a violent transnational loan-sharking operation in Pattaya area on May 30. The joint operation followed directives from the Royal Thai Police to crack

title: The surprising health benefits and risks of your favorite holy basil or pad krapao dish
desc: Holy basil, a staple ingredient in Thailand’s famous pad krapao, has been revered in traditional medicine for thousands of years and is often referred to as the “Queen of Herbs” for its wide range of potential health benefits. PATTAYA , Thailand – For many Thais, holy basil is simply the aromatic herb that gives pad krapao its unmistakable flavor and fragrance. It is a staple of street food stalls, home kitchens, and restaurants across the country. Yet beyond its culinary fame, holy basil has been revered for centuries as one of the most important medicinal plants in traditional medicine. Know
title_cn: 你最爱的圣罗勒打抄菜 Pad Krapao 的惊人健康益处和风险
summary_cn: 圣罗勒是泰国著名打抄菜的主要食材，在传统医学中被尊为「草药皇后」，因其广泛的潜在健康益处而受推崇。除了在烹饪中的名气外，圣罗勒几个世纪以来一直被视为传统医学中最重要的药用植物之一。虽然具有多种健康益处，但也存在某些风险值得关注和了解。
desc_original: Holy basil, a staple ingredient in Thailand’s famous pad krapao, has been revered in traditional medicine for thousands of years and is often referred to as the “Queen of Herbs” for its wide range of potential health benefits. title: Pattaya’s traffic order gets a rare win as Dolphin Roundabout lanes improve flow
desc: The colored traffic lanes at Dolphin Roundabout in North Pattaya are helping improve vehicle flow and reduce confusion at one of the city’s busiest intersections. PATTAYA, Thailand – While traffic complaints often dominate conversations about Pattaya, many motorists are beginning to acknowledge that not every change on the city’s roads has been negative, particularly around the newly organized traffic system at Dolphin Roundabout in North Pattaya. title_cn: 芭提雅海豚圆环（Dolphin Roundabout）交通改善成效显著
summary_cn: 芭提雅北部海豚圆环新增彩色车道和改进的交通指引系统，有效改善了车流并降低驾车人士的混淆。这是该市罕见的交通改善成果，表明并非所有道路改革都是消极的。

title: Visitors keep coming to Pattaya, but something is wrong with the spending
desc: Eaki and May Beer Bar is one example of a venue bucking the trend, with healthy crowds highlighting that tourists are still spending—but perhaps more selectively than before. (Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – The annual low season has arrived in Pattaya, but many business owners and long-time visitors believe this year feels different. Across Thailand, restaurant owners are reporting empty tables, bars are introducing increasingly aggressive promotions, and small tourism businesses are struggling to maintain revenues. While seasonal downturns are nothing new, a growing number of f
title_cn: 芭提雅游客数量不减，但消费大幅下滑
summary_cn: 虽然芭提雅进入旅游淡季，但今年的情况特别。泰国餐厅和酒吧普遍报告生意清淡，推出激进促销活动，小型旅游业务难以维持收入。游客仍在到访，但消费更加谨慎有选择性。
desc_original: Eaki and May Beer Bar is one example of a venue bucking the trend, with healthy crowds highlighting that tourists are still spending—but perhaps more selectively than before. title: Your overnight fan habit could be affecting your health, doctor warns
desc: While sleeping with a fan can help keep rooms cool and improve comfort during hot nights, experts say direct airflow and poor maintenance may contribute to congestion, dry airways, and allergy symptoms in some individuals. PATTAYA, Thailand – As temperatures continue to soar in many regions, countless people rely on electric fans throughout the night to stay cool and sleep comfortably. While keeping a fan running may seem like a harmless way to beat the heat, health experts say the habit can have unintended effects on some individuals, particularly those with allergies, asthma, or respiratory
title_cn: 医生警告：整夜开电扇可能危害健康
summary_cn: 虽然晚间开电扇有助保持室温舒适，但医疗专家指出，直接气流和维护不当可能引发鼻塞、气道干燥和过敏症状，特别是对患有过敏症、哮喘或呼吸系统疾病的人群影响较大。
desc_original: While sleeping with a fan can help keep rooms cool and improve comfort during hot nights, experts say direct airflow and poor maintenance may contribute to congestion, dry airways, and allergy symptoms in some individuals. PATTAYA, Thailand – As temperatures continue to soar in many regions, countless people rely on electric fans throughout the night to stay cool and sleep comfortably. While keeping a fan running may seem like a harmless way to beat the heat, health experts say the habit can hav

title: Chinese-run illegal e-waste plant raided
desc: Thai authorities have raided an unlicensed factory reportedly operated by Chinese nationals that was secretly sorting and processing electronic waste in the heart of Samut Sakhon province.
title_cn: 泰当局查封中资非法电子垃圾处理厂
summary_cn: 泰国当局查获了一家由中国籍人士运营的无执照工厂，该厂在沙没他卡农省（Samut Sakhon）秘密进行电子垃圾分类和处理。此次突击执法展现了泰国对环保和违法产业的打击力度。
desc_original: Thai authorities have raided an unlicensed factory reportedly operated by Chinese nationals that was secretly sorting and processing electronic waste in the heart of Samut Sakhon province.

title: Four more people freed from cave in Laos
desc: Four more ​people who were trapped ‌in a flooded cave in Laos for 10 days were brought out to safety on Saturday afternoon, Thai rescuers ​said.
title_cn: 老挝溶洞被困人员再有四人获救
summary_cn: 四名被困在老挝浸水溶洞十天的人员于周六下午成功获救。泰国救援队参与了此次救援行动，被困者逐步脱险。
desc_original: Four more ​people who were trapped ‌in a flooded cave in Laos for 10 days were brought out to safety on Saturday afternoon, Thai rescuers ​said.

title: Land Bridge a huge political risk for Bhumjaithai
desc: The much-vaunted Land Bridge project, once marketed as a transformative mega-development that would redefine Thailand’s role in global trade, risks becoming a political liability for the ruling Bhumjaithai Party. What was initially presented as a bold national vision now appears mired in uncertainty, resistance and wavering political commitment.
title_cn: 「土地桥」项目沦为执政党政治包袱
summary_cn: 备受瞩目的泰国「土地桥」（Land Bridge）大型发展项目原本被宣传为改变泰国全球贸易格局的转型工程，如今面临成为执政大城党政治包袱的风险。该项目初期被作为大胆的国家愿景推出，但现已陷入不确定、遭遇阻力，执政党的政治承诺也有所动摇。
desc_original: The much-vaunted Land Bridge project, once marketed as a transformative mega-development that would redefine Thailand’s role in global trade, risks becoming a political liability for the ruling Bhumjaithai Party. What was initially presented as a bold national vision now appears mired in uncertainty, resistance and wavering political commitment.

title: Chulalongkorn University's rare book room safeguards 25,000 historic volumes
desc: Chulalongkorn University’s rare book room, anchored by the Prince Kitiyakara Voralaksana and Prince Dhani Nivat collections, preserves about 25,000 items, including early Thai press works from King Rama III’s era.  The room combines conservation techniques and digitisation to protect and share Thailand’s historic publications worldwide via Chula Digiverse.
title_cn: 朱拉隆功大学珍善本室收藏2.5万册历史文献
summary_cn: 朱拉隆功大学（Chulalongkorn University）珍善本室以基蒂亚卡拉·沃拉拉克萨纳王子（Prince Kitiyakara Voralaksana）和达尼·尼瓦特王子（Prince Dhani Nivat）的藏书为核心，收藏约2.5万件文献，包括拉玛三世时期的早期泰国出版物。该部门采用保护技术和数字化手段，通过「朱拉数字宇宙」（Chula Digiverse）向全球共享泰国历史出版物。
desc_original: Chulalongkorn University’s rare book room, anchored by the Prince Kitiyakara Voralaksana and Prince Dhani Nivat collections, preserves about 25,000 items, including early Thai press works from King Rama III’s era.  The room combines conservation techniques and digitisation to protect and share Thailand’s historic publications worldwide via Chula Digiverse.

title: 4 Bangkok areas where condo rent is under ฿10,000 a month and still near the BTS/MRT
desc: 4 Bangkok areas where condo rent is under ฿10,000 a month and still near the BTS/MRT Legacy Bangkok Has Affordable Condos Near the BTS and MRT. Rents from under 10,000 baht a month. Everyone who’s searched for a Bangkok condo for the first time comes away with the same mild horror. Sukhumvit, Asok, Thong Lo, you’re looking at 20,000 baht a month before you’ve even filtered for furnished. Some listings say 35,000 like it’s completely normal. And for a moment, you genuinely wonder if living in this city on a regular salary is just not something people do. It is. You&#8217
title_cn: 曼谷4个地铁沿线社区月租不足万泰铢
summary_cn: 曼谷房租市场高企，但仍存在月租低于10000泰铢、邻近轨道交通（BTS/MRT）的社区。素坤逸（Sukhumvit）、阿索克（Asok）、通罗（Thong Lo）等热门区域月租多超过20000泰铢。本文介绍4个相对经济实惠的选项，为在泰工作或生活的外籍人士提供参考。

title: Uncle knifes nephew over handyman choice in Pattaya
desc: Uncle knifes nephew over handyman choice in Pattaya Legacy A family dispute over a hired handyman escalated into a knife fight between an uncle and nephew outside their home in Nong Prue, Pattaya , on Friday afternoon. Rescue personnel from the Sawang Boriboon Thammasathan Pattaya Foundation arrived at the scene at approximately 5pm after receiving reports of a knife-related altercation. At house No. 38, Village 12, they found 36 year old Anusorn Thongchai with a severe cut to his left little finger, which was nearly severed. Paramedics administered first aid before transporting him to Padmaku
title_cn: 芭提雅叔侄因雇工问题拔刀伤人
summary_cn: 泰国芭提雅农普噜（Nong Prue）地区发生一起家庭纠纷升级为暴力事件。两名男子因聘请维修工的选择问题产生严重争执，在家门外发生刀战，其中一人的左手小指被几乎完全割断。救援人员及时赶到现场提供急救，将伤者送往医院治疗。

title: Sri Racha bus driver caught with fake urine and meth on board
desc: Sri Racha bus driver caught with fake urine and meth on board Legacy A 57 year old public bus driver in Sri Racha, Chon Buri , has been arrested after trying to fool a routine drug test using fake urine and attempting to drink the evidence when officers closed in. Srisit Horai Khuntod, who drove the Sri Racha–Bangkok route, was flagged during a joint drug testing operation at around 1.30pm yesterday. The operation involved the Sri Racha District Administration, the Provincial Land Transport Office, and public health officials, as part of a Ministry of Interior campaign to reduce drug use among
title_cn: 北揽班车司机毒驾被捕
summary_cn: 泰国春武里府北揽（Sri Racha）一名57岁公交车司机在例行毒品检测中使用假尿液企图作弊，被当局察觉后又试图销毁证据。该司机驾驶北揽至曼谷线路，车上被查获冰毒。此项联合毒检行动由北揽区政府、省陆路交通部门及卫生部门开展，属于内政部打击交通从业人员药物滥用的系列活动。

title: Laos cave rescue: one out, six still inside as rains threaten progress
desc: Laos cave rescue: one out, six still inside as rains threaten progress Legacy Rescue teams in Laos freed one of seven villagers trapped inside a flooded cave in Xaisomboun province on the night of May 29, after more than ten days underground. The rescued man, identified in some reports as Muen, was brought out at approximately 8.37pm. He was alive but exhausted, covered in mud. Thai rescue group Metta Tham Rescue Kalasin confirmed the breakthrough on social media, saying the first victim had been successfully pulled from the cave. The seven men entered the cave around May 19-20, searching for
title_cn: 老挝洞穴救援：一人获救，六人仍被困，降雨威胁进展
summary_cn: 老挝塞松邦府（Xaisomboun）一处洞穴 5 月 19-20 日发生险情，7 名男性被困其中超过 10 天。泰国美达探险救援队（Metta Tham Rescue Kalasin）5 月 29 日成功救出首名被困人员（名叫 Muen），该男子已获救出洞，目前生命体征正常但极度疲惫。剩余 6 人仍在洞中，降雨持续威胁救援进展。
desc_original: Laos cave rescue: one out, six still inside as rains threaten progress Legacy Rescue teams in Laos freed one of seven villagers trapped inside a flooded cave in Xaisomboun province on the night of May 29, after more than ten days underground. The rescued man, identified in some reports as Muen, was brought out at approximately 8.37pm. He was alive but exhausted, covered in mud. title: Fuel prices drop in Thailand as global oil prices fall
desc: Fuel prices drop in Thailand as global oil prices fall Legacy Oil prices have fallen for the second consecutive day as of May 30, with updated figures now in effect at PTT, Bangchak, PT, Caltex, and Shell stations across Thailand. The new prices took effect at 5am. The Energy Policy and Planning Office, under the Ministry of Energy, released the latest fuel price updates. PTT (May 30, 2026) Gasohol 95: 42.90 baht/litre Gasohol E20: 37.90 baht/litre Gasohol E85: 33.84 baht/litre Gasohol 91: 42.53 baht/litre Premium Gasohol 95: 50.99 baht/litre Benzine 95: 52.49 baht/litre Diesel: 40.70 baht/lit
title_cn: 全球油价下跌带动泰国汽油价格下调
summary_cn: 受全球石油价格下跌带动，泰国油价实现连续两日下调。5 月 30 日凌晨 5 时起，新油价在 PTT、Bangchak、中石油泰国、Caltex、Shell 等全国主要加油站同步生效。根据能源政策规划办公室发布的数据，PTT 汽油 95 号降至 42.90 泰铢/升，E20 汽油降至 37.90 泰铢/升，柴油降至 40.70 泰铢/升。各油品均出现幅度不等的下调。

title: May 30 weather forecast warns of heavy rain across 51 provinces
desc: May 30 weather forecast warns of heavy rain across 51 provinces Legacy The Thai Meteorological Department has issued a weather forecast for continuous rainfall across 51 provinces today, with heavy rain expected in 60% of Bangkok and surrounding areas. Residents are urged to watch out for flash floods and forest runoffs. The pattern is driven by a strong southwest monsoon covering the Andaman Sea, Thailand, and the Gulf of Thailand, alongside a trough passing through northern, upper central, and lower northeastern Thailand into a low-pressure area along Vietnam’s central coast. Residents
title_cn: 泰国气象部预警：51 个府县将迎大雨
summary_cn: 泰国气象部 5 月 30 日发布气象预警，全国 51 个府县将迎来持续降雨天气。其中曼谷及周边地区 60% 以上地方将遭遇大雨袭击，当地民众需警惕山洪和山体滑坡风险。此天气格局由强西南季风（覆盖安达曼海、泰国境内及泰国湾）与通过泰国北部、中部上方及东北部下方的气压槽共同造成，气压槽还将延伸至越南中部沿海低气压系统。
